onboarding.slide1Title: Stay on top of your spending
onboarding.slide1Description: Track your daily expenses effortlessly and build better financial habits over time.
onboarding.slide2Description: See clear breakdowns of your spending by category with simple, visual analytics.
onboarding.slide3Description: Set budgets, track progress, and get gentle nudges to help you save more each month.
onboarding.lastDescription: Track expenses, manage your budget, and stay organized every day.

whatIsDaftr.question: What is Daftr?
whatIsDaftr.answer: Daftr is a personal finance app that helps you track your income, expenses, and spending habits in a simple way.

addExpense.question: How do I add an expense?
addExpense.answer: Tap the '+' button from the home screen, enter the amount, choose a category, and save the expense.

editDeleteExpenses.question: Can I edit or delete expenses?
editDeleteExpenses.answer: Yes, you can edit or delete any expense by tapping on its card. All your expenses are also available in the Transactions screen under the Expenses tab.

paydayFeature.question: How does the payday feature work?
paydayFeature.answer: Your balance automatically resets every month based on the payday you selected during setup.

extraIncome.question: Can I add extra income?
extraIncome.answer: Yes, you can add additional income sources like freelance work, bonuses, or any custom income.

dataSaved.question: Is my data saved?
dataSaved.answer: If you use Daftr as a guest, your data is stored only on your device. If you delete the app or log out, all guest data will be permanently removed. To keep your data safe and synced, you need to create an account or sign in.

terms.intro: Welcome to Daftr. By using this application, you agree to these Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully before using the app.

usage.title: Usage
usage.bullet: You may use the app only for personal financial tracking purposes.

accountResponsibility.title: Account Responsibility
accountResponsibility.bullet: You are responsible for keeping your account information secure.

dataAccuracy.title: Data Accuracy
dataAccuracy.bullet: Daftr helps organize your financial data, but users are responsible for the accuracy of entered information.

updates.title: Updates
updates.bullet: We may update features or modify the app experience at any time to improve the service.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.bullet: By continuing to use the app, you agree to these terms.

privacy.intro: At Daftr, we value your privacy. By using the app, you agree to the collection and use of your data to improve your financial tracking experience.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.bullet: We use secure methods to protect your personal information and financial records.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.bullet: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.

userControl.title: User Control
userControl.bullet: You can edit or delete your financial data at any time within the app.
